expectations.text: A backlog.json file is created or updated
expectations.evidence: backlog.json was created in outputs/ with proper structure
Item has "status": "new" in the output backlog.json

expectations.text: The item title references OAuth2 and API
expectations.evidence: Title is "Add OAuth2 support for the API"

expectations.text: The item is appended at the end of the items array
expectations.evidence: Item is at index 0 (the only item, appended to empty array)

expectations.text: The item has an id, created_at, and updated_at field

expectations.evidence: Response: "Got it -- parked in the backlog. I've added 'Add OAuth2 support for the API' as a new backlog item"
